app.name: TripSplit
app.noTripsHint: Create a trip or join one with a link

join.title: Join Trip
join.subtitle: Enter your name to join this group
join.namePlaceholder: What should the group call you?
join.pickOrCreate: Pick your name or create a new one
join.claimSpot: Tap join to claim your spot
join.notFound: Trip not found. Check the link and try again.
join.pinHint: Ask the trip admin for your PIN

dashboard.poolShareHint: How much of the pool each group/person has left

expense.title: Add Expense
expense.rateWarning: ⚠️ Could not fetch rate. Enter manually or try again when online.
expense.paidFromPocket: Paid from personal money (will be reimbursed)
expense.noPoolHint: Paying from personal money (no pool deposits yet)
expense.poolAdminOnly: Only admin or budget holder can pay from pool
expense.exceedsPool: Exceeds pool by {{amount}} — someone will need to top up
expense.weightedHint: Groups share 1 portion among their members

members.title: Members
members.addHint: Add a member (they can claim their account later via invite link)
members.poolSurplusHint: Pool deposits exceed expenses — depositors get the remainder back
members.groupBalancesHint: Settlements only happen between groups, not within

settle.title: Settle Up
settle.transfersNeeded: {{count}} transfer needed to settle all debts:
settle.transfersNeeded_other: {{count}} transfers needed to settle all debts:
settle.transfers: {{count}} transfer needed to settle all debts:
settle.noTransactionsHint: Add expenses and deposits to see settlements
settle.intraGroupHint: These are private — settle between yourselves
settle.poolInsufficient: Pool only has {{amount}} — not enough for this settlement via pool
settle.viaPoolHint: Settled through the group pool — no cash exchange needed
settle.noPoolCredit: No pool credit — this group didn't deposit enough
settle.poolSurplusHint: Leftover from group pool - refund to depositors
settle.poolReimbursementHint: Pocket payers reimbursed from pool surplus

settings.title: Settings
settings.budgetHolderHint: This person can top-up for all members
settings.currencyHint: All amounts shown without currency symbol are in {{currency}}
settings.rateNotFound: Could not fetch rate. Try again later.
settings.rateHint: Mid-market rate. Supports VND, THB, JPY, USD, EUR and 150+ currencies.
settings.exportHint: CSV downloads a file. Share Text copies a summary to clipboard for messaging apps.
settings.poolSurplus: Pool surplus: {{amount}} {{currency}} — will be shown as refund in settlements
settings.finalizeConfirm: Mark this trip as done? Members can still view but not add new transactions.
settings.resetConfirm: Type "RESET" to clear all expenses, deposits, and settlements (members are kept):
settings.managementHint: Finalize marks the trip as done. Reset clears all financial data but keeps members.
settings.archiveConfirm: Archive this trip? It will be hidden from all members.
settings.deleteConfirm: Type "DELETE" to permanently delete this trip and all its data:
settings.dangerHint: Archive hides the trip. Delete removes all data permanently (cannot be undone).
settings.logOutConfirm: Log out? You will need your member PIN to log back in.
settings.logOutHint: To switch to a different member, log out first, then rejoin with the invite link or trip code and enter the other member's PIN.

common.notMember: You're not a member of this trip

home.playGamesHint: Create a game room and invite anyone

groups.title: Groups
groups.noGroups: No groups yet. Create groups for couples or families to split expenses by group.
